cast.name: 艾美达·斯丹顿 Imelda Staunton
罗伯特·格林尼斯特 Robert Glenister

director.name: 多米尼克·库克 Dominic Cooke

this_title: National Theatre Live: Mrs. Warren's Profession
introduction: Five-time Olivier Award-winner Imelda Staunton (The Crown) joins forces with her real-life daughter Bessie Carter (Bridgerton) for the very first time, playing mother and daughter in Bernard Shaw’s incendiary moral classic.Vivie Warren is a woman ahead of her time. Her mother, however, is a product of that old patriarchal order. Exploiting it has earned Mrs. Warren a fortune – but at what cost?Filmed live from the West End, this new production reunites Staunton with director Dominic Cooke (Follies, Good ), exploring the clash between morality and independence, traditions and progress.
foreign_title: National Theatre Live: Mrs. Warren's Profession
